proof_points.evidence: Developer advocate and technical evangelist with 15 years building on, and explaining, blockchain technology. Looking for a DevRel or Technical Evangelist role at a Layer 1/2 protocol, developer tooling company, or infrastructure provider where both the code and the community matter.
